items.title_zh: ChatGPT 推出100美元月费Pro计划
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：OpenAI宣布推出100美元月费的ChatGPT Pro订阅档位，满足长期以来的强力用户需求。此前服务的付费计划直接从20美元跳到200美元，新增的100美元档位填补了中间价格空缺。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: OpenAI announced a new $100/month ChatGPT Pro subscription tier, fulfilling a longstanding request from power users. Previously, the service's paid plans jumped directly from $20 to $200 per month.

items.title_en: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达总检察长宣布调查OpenAI涉枪击案
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：佛罗里达总检察长宣布调查OpenAI，针对2025年佛罗里达州立大学枪击案展开调查，检察官称嫌疑人使用ChatGPT策划袭击。该事件造成两人死亡、五人受伤。受害人家属其中宣布将起诉OpenAI。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Florida's attorney general has launched an investigation into OpenAI over a 2025 Florida State University shooting that prosecutors say a suspect used ChatGPT to plan. The attack killed two people and injured five others. The family of one victim has announced plans to sue OpenAI over the incident.

items.title_en: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
items.title_zh: Meta AI应用在Muse Spark发布后升至App Store第5名
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Meta AI应用在推出Muse Spark新模型后排名从App Store第57位升至第5位并继续攀升。此前排名为57位，新模型发布后显著提升了应用表现。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: The Meta AI app climbed to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch. It was ranking No. 57 on the App Store just before Meta AI's new model launched. Now it's No. 5 — and rising.

items.title_en: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
items.title_zh: Anthropic限制Mythos发布是为保护互联网还是为保护自己？
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Anthropic本周表示限制了最新模型Mythos的发布，称该模型过于擅长发现用户全球依赖的软件中的安全漏洞。文章质疑这一安全理由是否真实，还是战略选择。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. The article questions whether this security rationale is genuine or a strategic choice.

items.title_en: Google and Intel deepen AI infrastructure partnership
items.title_zh: 谷歌与英特尔深化AI基础设施合作
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：谷歌与英特尔正寻求联合开发定制芯片，正值全球CPU需求高涨之际。两家科技巨头旨在共同应对日益增长的CPU短缺问题。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: The two tech giants are looking to co-develop custom chips, at a time when demand for CPUs is high due to a growing global shortage.

items.title_en: Sierra's Bret Taylor says the era of clicking buttons is over
items.title_zh: Sierra的Bret Taylor称点击按钮时代已经结束
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Sierra上月推出Ghostwriter，这是一个用于构建其他智能体的“智能体即服务”工具。用户只需描述需求，Ghostwriter即可自主创建和部署专用智能体来执行任务，取代传统的点击式网页应用。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Sierra launched Ghostwriter last month, an 'agent as a service' tool designed to build other agents. Users describe their needs, and Ghostwriter autonomously creates and deploys specialized agents to execute tasks, replacing traditional click-based web applications.

items.title_en: After data breach, $10B-valued startup Mercor is having a month
items.title_zh: 100亿美元估值独角兽Mercor遭遇数据泄露后陷入困境
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：100亿美元估值的AI独角兽Mercor遭黑客攻击后面临诉讼并 reportedly失去重要客户。首席执行官BrendanFoody在TechCrunch Disrupt 2025亮相的事件。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: After falling victim to a hacker, Mercor is facing lawsuits and reportedly losing big-name customers. The $10B-valued startup is having a difficult month.

items.title_en: OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest: Terms & Conditions
items.title_zh: OpenAI Full Fan Mode竞赛：条款与条件
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI Full Fan Mode竞赛官方条款与条件，包括资格要求、参赛步骤、评判标准和奖品详情。用户可通过Instagram参赛，有机会赢得IPL比赛门票。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: Explore the official terms and conditions for the OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest, including eligibility, entry steps, judging criteria, and prize details. Learn how to participate, submit your entry on Instagram, and win IPL match tickets.

items.title_en: CyberAgent moves faster with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：CyberAgent使用ChatGPT Enterprise和Codex安全地扩展AI采用，提高质量并加速广告、媒体和游戏等领域的决策。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: CyberAgent uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to securely scale AI adoption, improve quality, and accelerate decisions across advertising, media, and gaming.
